home.title: Strada Reports — The shortest path from data to decision
home.description: Turn ERP data into financial reports, profitability analysis and management dashboards. DIA ERP integration, AI assistant and mobile reporting.

solutions.title: Solutions — Integration, automation & financial reporting
solutions.description: DIA ERP connectivity, automated data synchronization, P&L, income-expense and collections reports. Explore the Strada Reports modules.

blog.title: Latest posts

blog.pageSubtitle: Expert content on financial reporting, DIA ERP integration and enterprise digital transformation.

hero.subtitle: Bring your critical business data into one hub. From financial reports to profitability analysis, receivable risk to production performance — turn scattered ERP data into instant, accurate and actionable reports.
hero.trustNote: Zero-effort ERP integration · DIA & Logo · KVKK compliant
hero.panelSubtitle: Overview of cash and bank accounts

socialProof.title: Manufacturing and construction firms achieve financial visibility with Strada Reports

features.title: Not more data — more control
features.subtitle: Strada Reports unifies financial visibility, operational control and production tracking in one reporting layer. Because today, advantage goes to those who manage data better — not those who produce more of it.

sync.title: Zero-Effort Integration
sync.description: Invoices, orders, production and financial movements flow from your ERP into Strada Reports automatically. No setup hassle, no copy-paste — entering data twice is history.

reports.title: Financial Visibility
reports.description: See revenue, expense, receivable risk, sales performance and profitability in one place. Financial decisions based on live reports — not last month's spreadsheets.

erp.title: On Top of Your ERP, With Your ERP
erp.description: Strada Reports is not an ERP and does not replace yours. It reads your data, turns it into meaningful reports and writes documents back to your ERP.

mobile.title: Reports in Your Pocket
mobile.description: See P&L, profitability, receivable risk and sales performance wherever you are. The moment of decision won't wait for you to get back to the office.

security.title: Talk to Your Data with AI
security.description: Ask "Why did profitability drop this month?" — the AI assistant scans your data and explains in plain language. Reading a report is one thing; understanding it is another.

showcase.title: Your real data, instant reports
showcase.subtitle: Screenshots from Strada Reports' live interface. From income-expense trends to sales trajectory, account balances to profit margin — every metric management needs in one place.

alt.main: Strada Reports Monthly Income–Expense Trend report: monthly bar chart with revenue, expense, net profit and profit-margin metrics
alt.sales: Strada Reports Sales Trend report: bar chart showing 12-month revenue trajectory
alt.ledger: Strada Reports Accounts report: table of debit and credit account balances

modules.title: A ready-made report for every process
modules.subtitle: From finance to production, sales to collections — modular reports that turn scattered ERP data into a shared management language.

items.name: Profit / Loss
items.desc: Net profit, margin and period comparison.

items.name: Income Report
items.desc: Revenue sources, trends and collection split.

items.name: Expense Report
items.desc: Expense items, budget variance and trends.

items.quote: Before Strada Reports, collecting reports took days. Now the data in DIA lands on our management screen instantly. Our decision speed has completely changed.
items.author: Mehmet Y.

items.quote: In a ready-mix concrete operation, seeing sales per customer and product in one table is priceless. Collections tracking alone paid for the investment.
items.author: Ayşe K.

items.quote: The mobile side changed our team's game. A manager in the field approves a quote and finance sees it at the same moment. We reached enterprise discipline with a small team.
items.author: Burak D.

ctaBanner.title: Ready to go from data to decision?
ctaBanner.subtitle: Let's schedule a live demo tailored to your company. In 20 minutes we'll show how Strada Reports turns your ERP data into instant, accurate and actionable reports.

hero.title: The reporting layer that makes your ERP data visible
hero.subtitle: Strada Reports unifies scattered systems in one visibility layer. From finance to sales, production to service — every critical metric reported on one platform.

integrations.title: Zero-effort ERP connectivity

points: Two-way, real-time connection with DIA ERP
Invoices, orders, production and finance flow automatically
Documents created in Strada write back to ERP

sync.title: All processes on one platform
sync.description: As businesses grow, systems drift apart. Strada Reports turns finance, sales, production and service data into a shared management language.
points: One hub instead of scattered screens

reporting.title: Financial visibility and profitability analysis

points: P&L, Income, Expense, Collections and Financial Position

erp.title: Doesn't replace — amplifies
erp.description: Strada Reports makes ERP data more visible, meaningful and manageable. Both systems work as one — seamlessly.
points: Reporting layer without changing your ERP investment

hero.title: The shortest path from data to decision
hero.subtitle: Strada is a Turkish technology company that turns scattered ERP data from manufacturing and construction firms into reliable, instant and actionable reports.

vision.title: Our vision
vision.body: Businesses don't need more reports — they need to understand existing data faster and decide with confidence. Strada Reports closes that gap.

values.title: Clarity
values.desc: The more complex the data, the simpler its presentation must be.

values.title: Trust
values.desc: Financial data is sacred. Security is not a feature — it's the foundation.

values.title: Speed
values.desc: Decision speed is competitive advantage. We work in real time.

security.title: Enterprise security infrastructure standards
security.subtitle: Your data is protected at every layer of the architecture.

items.title: End-to-end encryption
items.desc: TLS in transit and AES-256 at rest.

items.title: Role-based access
items.desc: Each user sees only the data they're authorized for.

items.title: KVKK compliance
items.desc: Personal data is processed per KVKK principles.

items.title: Audit trail
items.desc: Every access and change is logged.

items.title: Redundancy
items.desc: Regular backups and a disaster recovery plan.

items.title: Isolated architecture
items.desc: Data layers are separated in a multi-company structure.

grid.title: Modules tailored to your business
grid.subtitle: From inventory management to financial reporting — every solution works in real time with your DIA ERP data.

meta.title: Inventory Management — Warehouse and stock tracking
meta.description: DIA ERP-integrated inventory management: track warehouse movements, stock levels and sales in real time. Manage your warehouse processes from a single Strada Reports screen.

stok-yonetimi.title: Inventory Management
stok-yonetimi.tagline: Track your warehouse and inventory processes
stok-yonetimi.overview: Strada Reports Inventory Management visualises your warehouse and inventory data from DIA ERP in real time. See which product is in which warehouse, how much stock is on hand and sales velocity at a glance. No more manual report preparation.
benefits: Track stock levels across all warehouses in real time
Analyse stock sales trends and turnover rate
Speed up procurement planning with critical stock alerts
Automatic sync with DIA ERP — no manual data entry
features: Warehouse-level stock view with multi-warehouse support
Stock sales report for product performance analysis
Inventory movement history and period comparison
Mobile access for on-the-go stock checks
Exportable tables and presentation-ready visuals
useCases: Multi-warehouse stock tracking for manufacturing and construction firms
Ready-mix concrete and building materials procurement planning
Sales teams accessing up-to-date stock information in the field

meta.title: Stock Converter — Automatic stock code matching
meta.description: Automatically match stock codes across different systems. End manual mapping between supplier, customer and ERP stock codes with Strada Reports Stock Converter.

stok-donusturucu.title: Stock Converter
stok-donusturucu.overview: Different suppliers, customers or legacy systems use different stock codes. Strada Reports Stock Converter automatically maps these codes to your DIA ERP stock cards. It eliminates data transfer errors and accelerates processes.
benefits: Automatically match supplier and customer codes to ERP codes
Eliminate manual code conversion work
Automate repetitive tasks with bulk mapping rules
Prevent incorrect stock entries and mismatches
features: Flexible mapping rules and bulk import
Barcode, SKU and custom code format support
Suggestion and approval flow for unmatched codes
Two-way sync with DIA ERP stock cards
Mapping history and audit trail
useCases: Standardising product codes from multiple suppliers
Code mapping when migrating from legacy ERP to DIA
Automatic conversion of codes on customer order forms

meta.title: Invoice Converter — Import Excel invoices to ERP
meta.description: Import Excel invoices to DIA ERP in one click. End manual invoice entry and reduce error rates with Strada Reports Invoice Converter.

fatura-donusturucu.title: Invoice Converter
fatura-donusturucu.tagline: Import Excel invoices to ERP in one click
fatura-donusturucu.overview: Manually entering supplier Excel invoices into ERP is a waste of time. Strada Reports Invoice Converter reads standard Excel templates, validates rows and automatically imports them into DIA ERP. Processes that took minutes now take seconds.
benefits: Import Excel invoices to DIA ERP in one click
Prevent incorrect entries with row-level validation
Reduce the accounting team's workload with bulk processing
Automatically match invoices to stock and account cards
features: Flexible Excel template support and column mapping
Pre-import preview and error report
Automatic account and stock card matching
Bulk import and transaction history
VAT and amount validation checks
useCases: Bulk import of hundreds of monthly supplier invoices
Fast processing of subcontractor invoices on construction projects
Freeing the accounting team from manual data entry

meta.title: Expense Report — Group and analyse expense items
meta.description: Group all expense items by category, period and project. Turn your DIA ERP expense data into instant financial insight with Strada Reports Expense Report.

gider-raporu.title: Expense Report
gider-raporu.overview: Don't let your expenses get lost in scattered spreadsheets. Strada Reports Expense Report groups all expense movements from DIA ERP by category, period, project and department. Strengthen budget control with trend analysis and comparative views.
benefits: Automatically categorise expense items
Visualise monthly and annual expense trends
Detect budget variances early
Create board-ready expense reports
features: Expense grouping by category, project and department
Period comparison and trend charts
Integrated view with income-expense balance
Filterable tables and detail drill-down
PDF and Excel export
useCases: Monthly expense analysis for finance directors
Project-based cost tracking and budget control
Ready expense summaries for board presentations

meta.title: Income Report — Track company revenue in real time
meta.description: Track your company revenue in real time. Strada Reports Income Report turns your DIA ERP sales and collection data into an instant revenue flow view.

gelir-raporu.title: Income Report
gelir-raporu.tagline: Track your company revenue in real time
gelir-raporu.overview: Seeing your revenue flow instantly is the foundation of sound decisions. Strada Reports Income Report consolidates sales invoices, collections and income movements from DIA ERP on one screen. Spot growth opportunities with period comparison and trend analysis.
benefits: See all revenue sources on one screen
Analyse monthly and annual revenue trends
Track the split between collected and invoiced revenue
Make instant decisions with real-time data
features: Breakdown by revenue source and customer
12-month revenue trend and comparative charts
Income view integrated with collection status
Period, project and region filters
Presentation-ready visuals and export
useCases: Monthly revenue performance tracking for general managers
Sales team target achievement analysis
Revenue summaries for investor and stakeholder presentations

meta.title: Sales Report — Regional, staff and product sales analysis
meta.description: Analyse sales by region, staff and product. Visualise your DIA ERP sales data with detailed breakdowns using Strada Reports Sales Report.

satis-raporu.title: Sales Report
satis-raporu.overview: See your sales performance from every angle. Strada Reports Sales Report offers detailed breakdowns by region, sales rep, customer and product. Analyse which product sells where and which rep stands out — in one click.
benefits: Compare regional and sales rep performance
See product and stock-based sales distribution
Develop targeted strategy with customer segmentation
Analyse seasonality with 12-month sales trends
features: Breakdowns by region, staff, customer and product
Stock sales and customer distribution charts
Period comparison and growth rate calculation
Filterable tables and sorting
Mobile access for field sales tracking
useCases: Sales managers evaluating team performance
Product portfolio optimisation and stock planning
Developing regional growth strategy

meta.title: Order Report — Open and pending order tracking
meta.description: Track open and pending orders in real time. Monitor your DIA ERP order data by status, customer and delivery with Strada Reports Order Report.

siparis-raporu.title: Order Report
siparis-raporu.overview: Pending orders are the pulse of your operations. Strada Reports Order Report lists open orders from DIA ERP by status, customer, delivery date and product. Spot delay risks early and improve customer satisfaction.
benefits: See open and pending orders on one screen
Detect delivery delay risks early
Customer-based order history and status tracking
Support production and logistics planning with order data
features: Order status filtering: open, partial, completed
Customer and product-based order list
Delivery date and delay alerts
Stock sufficiency check via order-stock integration
Mobile notifications for instant order updates
useCases: Operations managers' daily order tracking
Customer relations team delivery status queries
Order prioritisation in production planning

meta.title: Profit/Loss Report — Net profitability analysis
meta.description: Measure your company's net profitability. Strada Reports P&L Report combines DIA ERP income and expense data for instant profit margin and financial performance views.

kar-zarar-raporu.title: Profit/Loss Report
kar-zarar-raporu.overview: Your business's true performance shows in the profit and loss statement. Strada Reports P&L Report combines all income and expense items from DIA ERP to deliver net profit, profit margin and period comparison instantly. The core metric for management decisions.
benefits: See net profit and profit margin in real time
Compare income-expense balance across periods
Analyse seasonality with monthly profit trends
Create board-ready financial summaries
features: Revenue, expense, net profit and profit margin metrics
Monthly and annual P&L trend charts
Detail drill-down with income-expense breakdown
Budget vs actual comparison
PDF report and presentation mode
useCases: Monthly profitability analysis for finance directors
Financial summary for board meetings
Performance data for investment and growth decisions
